Video.summary: Rick Hunter's back. He's considering marrying his girlfriend. But before he could, she is murdered.
Video.title: The Return Of Hunter: Everyone Walks In L.A.

Image.alt: The Return Of Hunter: Everyone Walks In L.A.
The Return Of Hunter: Everyone Walks In L.A.
The Return Of Hunter: Everyone Walks In L.A.
The Return Of Hunter: Everyone Walks In L.A.
The Return Of Hunter: Everyone Walks In L.A.
The Return Of Hunter: Everyone Walks In L.A.

Video.summary: McCall is charged with murder when the prime suspect in her dead detective husband's case is found dead.
Video.title: Requiem For Sergeant McCall

Video.summary: Hunter goes to Australia to help solve a murder involving a former girlfriend who's been missing for 3 years.
Video.title: Down And Under

Video.summary: A concert pianist is paralyzed by fear when a man jailed for her attempted murder is released from prison.
Video.title: Any Second Now

Video.summary: Sergeant McCall poses as a fashion model to expose a burglary ring preying on wealthy businessmen.
Video.title: Double Exposure

Video.summary: Hunter and McCall pose as spouses to investigate the murder of a girl whose death exposes a Soviet plot.
Video.title: The Girl Next Door

Video.summary: When Hunter refuses to reveal an informant to a Grand Jury, he is sent to jail, as a convicted murder is freed
Video.title: Informant

Video.summary: Hunter and McCall follow the trail of revenge and fraud while investigating the murder of a racehorse.
Video.title: Blood Line

Video.summary: Hunter falls in love with a beautiful professional killer who's connected to an arson case he's investigating.
Video.title: Straight To The Heart

Video.summary: Although Rita objects, a gigolo/killer-turned-writer is released on parole into the custody of his publisher. When the publisher's oversexed wife is found murdered, Rita immediately suspects the parolee but later learns that he's innocent of this crime.
Video.title: Crime Of Love

Video.summary: When Reno tracks down assault and battery suspect Jason Calhoun, the head of a gang of surfers, he is immediately enthralled by the young man's charisma but soon thereafter uncovers evidence of Calhoun's involvement in a much larger operation
Video.title: Endless Summer

Video.summary: Reno and Bobby learn to never underestimate the power of a woman when they encounter a beautiful, young bail jumper, wanted in San Diego for assaulting an officer and resisting arrest.
Video.title: Bonnie And Claire

Video.summary: After tailing robber Nicky Griffin for two years, Bobby and Cheyenne are able to link the man and his proficient get-away drivers to the stock car racing circuit through his most recent heist of a local bank
Video.title: Wheel Man / Wheel Men Don't Eat Quiche

Image.alt: Wheel Man / Wheel Men Don't Eat Quiche
Wheel Man / Wheel Men Don't Eat Quiche
Wheel Man / Wheel Men Don't Eat Quiche

Video.summary: When Reno learns of the escape of a convicted killer, he heads for Chicago to protect the arresting officer, his father, Police Sergeant Doug Raines
Video.title: Windy City Blues

Video.summary: When a distinguished municipal judge awakes after an intimate evening to find his "date" murdered during the night, he must pay the price to the club owner who is willing to help him cover up the incident.
Video.title: Honor Bound

Video.summary: When a love triangle involving a phony astrologist ends in murder, Chris and Rita investigate.
Video.title: Star Signs

Video.summary: Rita Infiltrates a phone sex operation to find a murderer.
Video.title: Voices

Video.summary: Three fhends are stalked by a serial killer; Chris worries after turning to Cotton for help with a tax audit.
Video.title: Team Spirit

Video.summary: Chris falls for a suspected mob assassin.
Video.title: The Perfect Alibi

Video.summary: Reno's latest job gets personal - the bounty is on the head of Earl Lyons, an ex-Army Ranger from Reno's unit.
Video.title: Lyon's Roar

Video.summary: Reno falls into a deadly trap when false news reports claim that Valerie Prentice, his comatose fiancee, has awakened.
Video.title: Val's Song

Video.summary: Reno assists a stranded motorist change her flat tire who later turns up dead.
Video.title: Give And Take

Video.summary: Reno's latest bounty kidnaps a wealthy Japanese businessman's daughter.
Video.title: Samurai

Video.summary: Appearances are deceiving, when Reno discovers a look alike is committing crimes in his name.
Video.title: The Two Renos

Video.summary: Reno rolls into town, tracking a gang of vicious cutthroats.
Video.title: Billy

Video.summary: A desperate psychotic escapes from a prison with a plan for revenge against the men who put him behind bars: Reno and Bobby.
Video.title: Headcase
